log: --- Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 13
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Gem Flight + Hypnotic Pattern.
BONUS: Gem Flight activated (2/3 remaining). Flying for 10 rounds.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:17+3=20 vs DC 17] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:11+-2=9 vs DC 17] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:4+-2=2 vs DC 17] FAIL!
REASONING: Throwing rock at Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster (flying).
--- Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 13 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 17 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:4+3=7 vs DC 17] FAIL! 8 psychic damage. HP: 130/138
REASONING: Throwing rock at Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster (flying).
→ Rock: [d20:8+9=17 vs AC 13] HIT! 29 damage. Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster HP: 30/59
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
--- Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster --- HP: 30/59 | AC: 13
REASONING: No concentration active. 3 enemies. Recasting Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 17 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:14+3=17 vs DC 17] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:1+-2=-1 vs DC 17] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:4+-2=2 vs DC 17] FAIL!
REASONING: Throwing rock at Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster (flying).
→ Rock: [d20:14+9=23 vs AC 13] HIT! 28 damage. Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster HP: 2/59
--- Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster --- HP: 2/59 | AC: 13 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (2/59). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (55ft). Javelin at Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (60ft). Javelin at Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster.
→ Javelin: [d20:13+6=19 vs AC 13] HIT! 13 damage. Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster HP: -11/59
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Greater Invisibility ends!
--- Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 13
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Gem Flight + Hypnotic Pattern.
BONUS: Gem Flight activated (2/3 remaining). Flying for 10 rounds.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:4+3=7 vs DC 17] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:15+-2=13 vs DC 17] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:7+-2=5 vs DC 17] FAIL!
